languages.title: Chengey
languages.subtitle: Roish y çhengey t'er ny h-ussaghey trooid y app.
languages.noResults: Cha nel çhengey erbee cordail rish dty ymmyd.

phone.label: Uimhir y phone
phone.searchCountry: Lhig da'n cheer, code, ny ro-laue
phone.noCountries: Cha nel ardjyn erbee cordail rish dty ymmyd.
phone.countryButton: Caghlaa yn cheer, %{country} as %{callingCode} er-y-fa shen
phone.invalid: Cuir stiagh uimhir phone ymmydoil son y çheer taitnyssagh.

auth.onboardingTagline: Companyn slaynt persoonagh son ny traaghyn eddyr “Ta mee mie” as “Ta feme aym er cooney.”
auth.createSubtitle: Choose y raad sign-in dy choadey dty graph slaynt.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Cha b'aashagh shin cur seose y sign-in. Check dty cheshaght as feddyn magh reesht.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Ushtey jeh session forsaghey ynnydagh. Ta Google Sign-In obbraghey ayns towse forsaghey.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pair nish ny lesh as cur eh rish ny yei.
auth.northStarBody: Yn VL01 wearable t'eh ry-gheddyn slystaghyn s'saghney lesh tappyn as gestures press fadagh.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Dy chompanyn slaynt glen 'sy map as 'sy ghlare.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear faggys eh cooney lesh mood thie, mood guardian, mood urjid, glareyn lesh ymmyd, as tastey boght.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Cleayney son y chaart, cryssyn peril, ard-vooinjerey, as SOS context.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving goaill stiagh ynnyd dy vod ny guardianyn tushtey y ghoaill c'raad t'ad feme er cooney. Faggys da'n red shoh y chaghlaa 'sy 'Settings'.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Ta fysseree tastey jeh check-ins as taghyrtyn urjid.
permissions.notificationsBody: Cha nel shin uss agh ymmyd jeh fysseree son prompts safety, updates emergency, as reminders ta shiu cur stiagh.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Ta'n ynnyd cur y context s'saualtys ry-cheilley
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving t'eh usaghey dty ard-chleaysh son y map s'saghney, cryssyn danger, co-roshtyn quick, as SOS context. Faggys da'n red shoh y chaghlaa 'sy 'Settings'.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Ta feme er raaidyn-slaynt son fysseree
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving t'eh cur cowrey check-in, nushteeyn urjid, as cowrey s'saghney ta shiu cur stiagh. Cha nel shin uss ymmyd jeh fysseree son advertisementyn.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Ta'n microphone cur cummey da glareyn sheeanchoree
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving t'eh usaghey dty microphone ny-lomarcan tra t'ou uss t'er toshiaght AI companion ny glare s'saghney.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving t'eh uss Bluetooth dy cho-paartaghey lesh NorthStar jewelry, lesh stayd ceaghley, as trigger slystyn shleiy veih'n wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving t'eh usaghey y chamera ny-lomarcan tra t'ou uss roshtyn dy ghoaill pictur profile ny dy choardail rish pictur safety.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving t'eh cur y slyst shoh ry-gheddyn veih Soilshaghyn as y dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Pick y voylley companion ta feer sheelt dy chlashtyn.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Monitoring quiet son y slaynt laa as laa.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Share y cho-theay lesh deiney creeney.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Foddee cwoaie tappyn escalate gys SOS as raaidyn guardian.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Cruinney reason gracious dy scarrey rish stayd neu-chosney.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Toshiaght glare companion real-time tra ta feme ayd er cooney.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Try ny slystyn slaynt ayns demo low-brish.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Cur y jewelry ry-cheilley tra t'ou scaan.
jewelry.noDevices: Cha nel NorthStar innidyn ry-gheddyn foast.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth cha b'ee y scaanaghey toshiaght. Feayrish reesht, my yeearree.
jewelry.scanFailed: Cha dod shin jewelry y gheddyn. Check Bluetooth, cum NorthStar er-gerrey, as feddyn magh reesht.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth cha b'ee y scaanaghey toshiaght. Sheck Bluetooth access as feddyn magh reesht.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Ta'n obbyr 'sy ghraih-instrument er-chea. Lesh Bluetooth stiagh ayns Soitçhyn, as feddyn magh reesht.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar ghow eh ro-am dy cheangley. Mow eh ny s’drymmey as feddyn eh reesht.
jewelry.connectFailed: Cha b'aashagh shin ceaghley rish NorthStar. Sheck dy vel eh charged as ry-cheilley, as feddyn magh reesht.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Cum NorthStar charged as gerrit rish y phone shoh, as scaan eh reesht.

home.subtitle: Dashboard co-chaarjys
home.readyBody: Ta cowrey, map, jewelry, as guardianyn un tap er-chea.

map.title: Map y slaynt
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go ro-earroo; Mapbox renders ayns towse y ghraih.
map.updateFailed: Cha b'aashagh shin cur dty ynnyd er-ny-host. Feayrish reesht, my yeearree.
map.notRequested: Cha row ymmyd jeh'n 'location' er ny ghoaill. Faggys da'n 'Settings' 'sy 'Settings'.
map.permissionOff: Ta'n obbyr 'sy 'nnyd off. Cur eh stiagh ayns Soilshaghyn dy hroggal y map s'saghney er dty hon.
map.timeout: Ta'n 'location' ayd's goaill ny smoo 'sy traa t'er n'gholl shaghey. Mow ayns ard-valley lesh signal ny sodjey as feddyn magh.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Bee ny laghyn creeney t'ou uss shaghey ry-akin ec shoh son ymmyd s'leaie.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Ceaghley dy scanshoil rish dty chompanyn ghoo...
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Toshiaght y ghlare ny scrieu teacht tra t'ou ready.

chat.notSent: Cha nel y theay er ny choyrt.

history.clearMessage: T'eh shoh cur magh AI teachtyn co-chasley jeh'n innid shoh.
history.title: Eash y cho-chowrey
history.subtitle: AI teachtyn co-chasley er nyn goyrt stiagh er y ghraih shoh.
history.empty: Cha nel cowrey erbee er ny s'sauail foast.
history.emptyMessage: By lhisagh ny AI co-chaslyssyn eu ve ry-akin ec shoh erreish da'n chiad ghlare eu.
history.loadFailed: Cha b'aashagh shin taghyrtyn co-chaslys y lhoobey. Feayrish reesht, my yeearree.
history.clearFailed: Cha b'aashagh shin cleayney tashtey y cho-chowrey. Feayrish reesht, my yeearree.
history.deleteFailed: Cha b'aashagh shin y cho-chowrey shen y scughey. Feayrish reesht, my yeearree.

voices.title: My ghlare-slaynt
voices.subtitle: Choose y voylley companion ta ry-chlashtyn.
voices.selectionFailedTitle: Cha nel y roghnagh er ny choadey
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Farrey dy reih y voylley reesht.
voices.sampleFailedTitle: Sampleyr cha nel eh ry gheddyn
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Cha b'ee y sampleyr boght shoh er ny chlashtyn. Feayrish reesht, my yeearree.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Cleaysh freggyrtyn companion bundled tra nagh vel y red ny Hume credentials ry-gheddyn.
settings.privacyBody: Export ny scughey ny cooishyn 'sy valley ta ry-gheddyn 'sy 'instrument' shoh.
settings.deleteAll: Smooinee er ooilley ny cooishyn 'sy valley
settings.exportFailedTitle: Cha nel eh er n'eiyrt magh
settings.exportFailedMessage: Cha nel eh ry-hoi ymmyrkey dty data er-y-fa shen.
settings.deleteConfirmTitle: Smooinee er ooilley ny cooishyn 'sy valley?
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: T'eh shoh cur magh dty phrofiil, dty soilshaghyn, dty chowraghyn ec y traa t'ayn, dty stayr cowrey, cowreydyn ceaut, as session auth local veih'n innid shoh.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Cha nel eh ry-hoi y scughey data local annoish.
settings.linkFailed: Cha nel eh ry-hoi y linney y foshley

sections.languageSubtitle: Caghlaa yn eaddagh as y system
sections.privacySubtitle: Eash, ymmyrkey magh, scughey, as policy

settings.updateFailedMessage: Cha b'aashagh shin y roshtyn shen y sparrey. Feayrish reesht, my yeearree.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Ta'n session ayd foast glan. Feayrish reesht, my yeearree.

contacts.title: Connaghtyn ec y traa t'ayn
contacts.subtitle: Duiney creeney ry-gheddyn rish slystaghyn slaynt.
contacts.name: Ennym
contacts.empty: Cha nel co-chowraghyn urjid er nyn goyrt stiagh foast.
contacts.emptyTitle: Cha nel co-chowraghyn erbee er-mayrn foast
contacts.emptyMessage: Cuir rish dooinney ta shiu credjal dy vod ad ve ready tra ta slyst safety feme orroo.
contacts.removeMessage: Cha bee y dooinney shoh er ny hoilshaghey ayns dty slyst emergency.
contacts.saveFailedTitle: Cha nel y cho-chowrey er ny s'sauail
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Cha b'aashagh shin y cho-chowrey shoh y scanshoil. Check ny mraane as feddyn magh reesht.
contacts.removeFailedTitle: Cha nel y cho-chowrey er ny chur magh
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Cha b'aashagh shin y cho-chowrey shoh y chur ersooyl. Feayrish reesht, my yeearree.

friends.title: Caarjyn
friends.subtitle: Guardianyn, irriney, as graph ymmyrchagh.
friends.emptyMessage: By lhisagh caraid as guardianyn creeney ve ry-akin ec y traa t'ayn tra t'ad er nyn goyrt stiagh.

emergency.title: Er-earroo SOS
emergency.subtitle: Escalate agh tra ta feme ayd er cooney dy h-oikoil.
emergency.body: This t'eh cur fys da'n slyst shleiy as t'eh ry-hoi ry-hoi.
emergency.notificationBody: Ta'n slyst ec y traa t'ayn ready.
emergency.addContact: Cuir stiagh ymmyd jeh'n 'emergency' ayns Soitçhyn.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Ta'n stub rannaghey 'sy 'nnyd ready. Ceangley yn 'endpoint share' backend dy chur ceaghleyn beo.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: Tapp daa cheayrt er dty NorthStar dy scughey orange s'saghney.
capybearTap.body: Ta'n raad gesture ready son wiring BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: T'ou myr dy vel oo offline. Ta'n teisht er ny choyrt tra t'ou uss ry-cheilley.
errors.voiceQueued: Teisht er ny s'sauail. T'eh er ny choyrt tra t'eh ry-cheilley rish y chompanyn voice.
errors.voiceRetrying: T'ou uss jannoo ymmyd jeh dty theayrt reesht...
errors.voiceConnecting: Ceaghley dy scanshoil rish dty chompanyn voice...
errors.microphone: Ta feme er microphone son glareyn boght. Faggys oo eh ayns Settings, ny scrieu teacht ayns e ynnyd.
errors.billing: Cha nel y chompany boght online ry-gheddyn son traa. Faggys da’n chompany offline.
errors.authentication: Cha b'ee y chompany boght ry-hoi y session shoh y verify. Sign in reesht ny uss uss y chompany offline son y traa t'ayn.
errors.timeout: Ghow y chompanyn boght ry-hoi dy freggyrt. Check dty cheshaght as feddyn magh reesht.
errors.network: Cha b'aashagh shin reach y chompany boght. Sheck dty cheet-stiagh, as feddyn magh reesht ny gow ersooyl offline.
errors.genericVoice: Ren red erbee y ghlare y ghlare. Feaysaghey reesht, ny lesh magh rish y chompany offline.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving ta feme er microphone son slaynt as AI glareyn companion.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving t'eh usaghey dty ard-valley son y map s'saghney as ny s'saghney t'ayn.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving t'eh uss Bluetooth dy cheangley rish dty NorthStar jewelry slaynt.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Cha nel yn reih shoh son loggal stiagh ry-gheddyn ayns y lhieggan shoh.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Goll er adhart myr demo (son lhiasaghey ny-lomarcan)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Cha nel demo mode jannoo ymmyd agh jeh fysseree foalsey ynnydagh. Cha nel ny shirveishyn kianglt firrinaghit, as bee yn çhoie shoh aahoiaghey tra vees yn app laadit reesht.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Ta'n code firrinaghey neu-chiart ny er jeet gys jerrey. Shir code noa as prowal reesht.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Ro ymmodee prowalyn dy loggal stiagh. Fuirree tammylt as eisht prowal reesht.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Ren firrinaghey y loggal stiagh goaill ro foddey. Jean shickyr jeh dty cheangal as prowal reesht.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Cha dod shin roshtyn yn çhirveish loggal stiagh. Jean shickyr jeh dty cheangal as prowal reesht.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Ta dty çhoie er jeet gys jerrey. Log stiagh reesht.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Cha dod yn kaart sauçhys laadey. Jean shickyr jeh dty cheangal as prowal reesht.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Cha nel ynnyd bio ry-gheddyn. Ta dty ynnyd s'jerree sauailt veih %{capturedAt} ry-akin.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Cha dod shin dty ynnyd y rheynn. Jean shickyr jeh'n chied son ynnyd as prowal reesht.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Shoh my ynnyd s'jerree sauailt, recortit ec %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Ta entreilys Bluetooth jeant magh. Cur er ayns Soiaghyn eh, as eisht prowal reesht.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Ta Bluetooth jeant magh. Cur er eh, as eisht prowal reesht.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Cha nel paidjey Bluetooth ry-gheddyn er yn saase ny lhieggan shoh.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Cha dod shin NorthStar y gheddyn. Freill eh er-gerrey, jean shickyr jeh Bluetooth, as prowal reesht.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Cha row saaseyn NorthStar er-gerrey er nyn gheddyn. Freill eh er-gerrey as scan reesht.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Cha dod shin ceangal rish NorthStar. Freill eh currit lesh bree as er-gerrey, as eisht prowal reesht.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Cha dod shin yn ynnyd shoh y hauail. Prowal reesht.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Foshilt yn dialleyder çhellvane; cha row yn eam firrinaghit.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Dolley magh; cha row eam er ny yannoo.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Cha row çhellvane cooney ry-gheddyn; cha row eam er ny yannoo.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Cha dod yn dialleyder çhellvane fosley; cha row eam er ny yannoo.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Cha dod yn prowal SOS s'jerree ve firrinaghit.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Cha nel yn sheshey coraa ry-gheddyn ec y traa shoh. Prowal reesht ny s'anmey ny gow er adhart lesh yn sheshey ass-line.
